description: Zero-knowledge persistent memory for Claude — encrypted, semantic search, EU hosted.
name: io.github.pquattro/memoraeu-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Your MemoraEU API key (starts with meu-sk-). Create one at app.memoraeu.isquarecube.fr.
environmentVariables.name: MEMORAEU_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Your encryption secret (never sent to the server). Found in Settings on app.memoraeu.isquarecube.fr.
environmentVariables.name: MEMORAEU_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Your encryption salt. Found in Settings on app.memoraeu.isquarecube.fr.
environmentVariables.name: MEMORAEU_SALT

environmentVariables.description: Mistral API key for semantic embeddings. Get one at console.mistral.ai.
environmentVariables.name: MISTRAL_API_KEY

title: MemoraEU
